or
Write the sentence as an equation.

167 and m more is the same as 93

The sentence can be written as an equation as follows:

167 + m = 93

Write the sentence as an equation.

363 is equal to 34 reduced by r

The sentence can be written as an equation as follows:

363 = 34 - r

Write the sentence as an equation.

The sentence can be written as an equation as follows:

101 + h = 346

Write the sentence as an equation.

The sentence can be written as an equation as follows:
